data.name: PhysiFlow｜通过多脑潜在流匹配和鲁棒跟踪实现物理感知的人形全身VLA
DIAL｜通过端到端VLA的潜在世界建模解耦意图和行动
Gemini Robotics｜将人工智能带入物理世界
AgiBot World Colosseo｜用于可扩展和智能具身系统的大规模操作平台
MIT人形机器人：面向杂技行为的设计、运动规划与控制

data.description: PhysiFlow: Physics-Aware Humanoid Whole-Body VLA via Multi-Brain Latent Flow Matching and Robust Tracking cites or references A Pragmatic VLA Foundation Model.

PhysiFlow: Physics-Aware Humanoid Whole-Body VLA via Multi-Brain Latent Flow Matching and Robust Tracking cites or references AgiBot World Colosseo: A Large-scale Manipulation Platform for Scalable and Intelligent Embodied Systems.

PhysiFlow: Physics-Aware Humanoid Whole-Body VLA via Multi-Brain Latent Flow Matching and Robust Tracking cites or references DIAL: Decoupling Intent and Action via Latent World Modeling for End-to-End VLA.

The MIT Humanoid Robot: Design, Motion Planning, and Control For Acrobatic Behaviors cites or references PhysiFlow: Physics-Aware Humanoid Whole-Body VLA via Multi-Brain Latent Flow Matching and Robust Tracking.
PhysiFlow: Physics-Aware Humanoid Whole-Body VLA via Multi-Brain Latent Flow Matching and Robust Tracking cites or references Gemini Robotics: Bringing AI into the Physical World.
